description: A11 transfer-test incident pairs. Each pair shares root cause (failure_class + canonical fix tool) but differs in surface symptom (leaf-visible vs buried cascade, different topology and service names). Use A as train, B as held-out transfer test (or vice versa).

pairs.symptom_A: the log-shipper service itself errors out (leaf, root visible)
pairs.symptom_B: two downstream callers (orders-svc, notify-svc) breach SLO while the api-gw root is buried (cascade)

pairs.symptom_A: payments-svc rejects its own calls (leaf, root visible)
pairs.symptom_B: web-frontend and mobile-bff both 5xx while tls-ingress is the buried root (cascade)
catalog-api and recsys degrade from origin overload while object-cache is the buried root (cascade)
